scope: LK OS Phase 3 Pareto-compatible vs Lucas-operational split, read-only

pareto_compatible: Match influencer primarily by Meta ad_name using Maicon rule.
Sum all ad_id rows under the same normalized influencer.
Keep Maria, Maria Fernanda and Mariah separated.
Numbers remain platform_signal and are compatible with Pareto/Meta dashboard language.
lucas_operational: Do not decide product, stock, budget, coupon or creative from campaign/adset generic names.
Require Shopify/Tiny bridge for product/SKU/size consequences.
Silvia/Helena have usable bridge for internal analysis; Lala remains investigation in this recorte.
Even when usable, execution still requires explicit approval for campaign/coupon/send/write.

global_platform_signal.label: Meta global
global_platform_signal.match_basis: Meta ad_name primary, adset/campaign fallback only if ad_name absent

split_rows.label: Silvia

pareto_compatible.label: Silvia
pareto_compatible.match_basis: Meta ad_name primary, adset/campaign fallback only if ad_name absent

split_rows.operational_decision_limit: may_prepare internal product/stock analysis only, still no campaign/coupon/send/write without approval
